data.name: Lucky Flash
data.detailed_description:
Michael “Lucky Flash” Foster, a university student and part-time courier spends his days racing city streets with a van full of packages and a schedule full of chaos. At Speed Deliveries, every package carries a story — and every stop holds a possibility. Guide Lucky Flash through a day-job full of memorable encounters. Balance routes, banter, and relationships in a cozy slice-of-life world where love and passion show up in unexpected places.

What's inside:

- Intimate, character-driven story (with a touch of humour) set in the warmth (and chaos) of everyday working life, wrapped around romantic subplots

- Multiple branching paths and affection-based endings

- Distinct personalities and richly written dialogue

- Stunning artwork and animations

data.short_description: A visual novel/game about Michael "Lucky Flash" Foster — a university student and part-time courier whose daily deliveries turn into memorable adventures.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300 @ 2,80 GHz, AMD FX 8120 @ 3.1 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 970 / RX 480
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
